title: Runner MCP registry baseline lane precheck
delta_summary: local runner-side MCP registry module provides full baseline implementation
includes canonical default seeding (`hive-tools`, `gcu-tools`, `files-tools`) and stale alias cleanup (`hive_tools` -> `hive-tools`)

risk_signals.evidence: entire runner MCP registry module is local additive relative to upstream
risk_signals.impact: replay/reconcile must preserve local runner MCP behavior used by runtime contracts

planned_validation: uv run --package framework python - <<'PY' ... import framework.runner.mcp_registry check ... PY
uv run --package framework python - <<'PY' ... MCPRegistry.ensure_defaults stale alias cleanup smoke ... PY
decision_gate: prefer keep_local when runner baseline is additive, behaviorally validated, and upstream replacement is non-trivial
